examples: A blackbird flew down and perched on the parapet outside his window.
Looking up, he saw two stoats leaning over the parapet of the bridge and watching him with great glee.
inquired one pigeon of another which was peering over the edge of the north parapet.
Few raise their heads above the parapet to blow the whistle on their bosses.
"Putting my head over the parapet has not been my favorite thing, " he admits.
